title: Pre-slice-27 ingredient category and cooking method consumer alignment
summary: slice 27 YouTube 기능 개선 전에 현재 MVP의 모든 ingredient category / cooking method 소비자를 같은 기준 shared source/helper에 정렬한다. ingredient는 2026-06-08 follow-up 기준 `과일` 포함 v1 canonical 8종 카테고리를 단일 shared mapping source로 수렴시키고, cooking은 분산된 색상/fallback helper를 하나로 통합한다.
goal: slice 27 선행으로, 현재 MVP의 ingredient category / cooking method 소비자를 같은 기준 source에 정렬하여 taxonomy 임시 분기 없이 다음 YouTube 기능 개선을 시작할 수 있게 한다.

actual_verification_refs: pnpm exec vitest run tests/ingredient-categories.test.ts tests/cooking-method-colors.test.ts tests/recipe-api-contracts.test.ts tests/pantry-core.backend.test.ts tests/youtube-dictionary-resolution.test.ts tests/youtube-import.backend.test.ts
pnpm local:reset:demo (blocked: Docker image layer no space left on device)
pnpm exec vitest run (1541 tests, 150 files — full suite pass after Stage 4 frontend sweep)

pnpm exec vitest run tests/home-screen.test.tsx tests/recipe-ingredient-add-modal.test.tsx tests/pantry-screen.test.tsx tests/cooking-method-colors.test.ts tests/recipe-detail-screen.test.tsx (Codex post-review targeted pass)

notes: Merged via PR #591, PR #592, and PR #593. Ingredient category consumers now delegate to shared source (lib/ingredient-categories.ts): recipe-ingredient-add-modal emoji, pantry-screen CATEGORY_VISUAL, pantry-mobile-visuals fallback emoji, youtube-import-screen category choices. Cooking method consumers align to shared helper (lib/cooking-method-colors.ts): recipe-detail-screen local color/tint maps removed, cook-mode-mobile-ui lime alias added, and Codex preserved existing recipe-detail red/yellow tint weights in the shared helper. Stage 5 was absorbed into Stage 6 as a low-risk lightweight design check: no new screen, no redesign, visual/a11y core passed. Claude Stage 1/3/4 artifacts captured; Codex Stage 2 and Stage 6 completed. Verification passed: backend/shared targeted Vitest, pnpm verify:backend, frontend targeted Vitest, pnpm verify:frontend:pr, HOME filter E2E, PANTRY category E2E, COOK_MODE method color E2E, workflow/workpack validators, closeout-sync validator, PR #593 current-head checks. Manual-only live YouTube Data API scenario remains unchecked by design.
